description: MCP server that dispatches physical-world tasks to humans through a unified API

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.zyntarasystems/human-dispatch-mcp

environmentVariables.description: API key for the RentAHuman.ai backend
environmentVariables.name: RENTAHUMAN_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: AWS access key ID for the Amazon Mechanical Turk backend
environmentVariables.name: MTURK_ACCESS_KEY_ID

environmentVariables.description: AWS secret access key for the Amazon Mechanical Turk backend
environmentVariables.name: MTURK_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to "false" to use MTurk production environment (defaults to sandbox mode)
environmentVariables.name: MTURK_SANDBOX

environmentVariables.description: Webhook URL for the manual backend to send task notifications
environmentVariables.name: MANUAL_WEBHOOK_URL
